name: Pork Chops with Spaghetti

ingredients.item: fresh parsley sprigs, leaves only, chopped

method: In a large heavy skillet, combine 1/4 cup of butter and olive oil and heat. Add red and black pepper and garlic and
Add pork chops, drizzle with rosemary, and cook for 5 minutes on each side. Lower heat and add parsley, tomatoes
and salt. Cover with a lid and continue cooking for about 19 minutes.
Remove the lid and cook until ready, or for 20 minutes.
Bring salted water to boil in a large pot and cook spaghetti for about 10 minutes and drain. Put it back in the pot and
Add a little sauce from the pork chops and grated cheese and stir to mix.
Put spaghetti on a platter with pork chops. Pour the sauce and enjoy.
